title: DELCARATION OF PUBLIC HOLIDAY
content:
38/2026-2027

Siaha, 23rd April 2026 :In pursuance of the letter No. H.11011/28/2025-GAD dated 15th April, 2026 issued by the General Administration Department, Government of Mizoram, an as conveyed by the Secretary, State Election Commission, Mizoram vide No.B.12024/1/2025-SEC/VC/MADC/23 dated 16th April, 2026, the Government of Mizoram has declared 30th April, 2026 (Thursday) as a Public Holiday for all Government Servants including employees under Central/State public Undertakings, Educational Institutions and Banking Institutions within 6(six) Village Councils as given below.

1. 9- Meisavaih East

2. 15- Thosai

3. 22- College Vaih-II

4. 31- Na-aohtlah III

5. 61- Tipa V-III

6. 93- Khaikhy

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT TIPA-AH RUALBANLOTE TAN IDENTITY CARD SIAM RUNPUI NEIH A NI
content:
265/2026-2027

Dated Siaha, the April 23rd, 2026 :Vawiin khan Primary Health Centre, Tipa-ah ‘rualbanlote tan Identity Card siam runpui’ (assessment camp) neih a ni a, Zoram Medical College & Hospital leh District Hospital, Siaha-a doctor leh thawktu dangte an kal. Specialist Medical Doctor kalte hi - ENT, Medicine, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics/PMR, Paediatrics, Psychiatry niin Clinical Psychologist, Audiologist leh Optometrist an tel bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Siaha district chhung khaw hrang hrang aṭangin mi eng emaw zat an kal khawm a, uluk taka en niin rualbanlo certificate mi 180 (za sawmriat) pek chhuah an ni. Rualbanlote tán Aadhaar enrollment (new) leh siam ṭhat (correction) ngaite a thlawnin siamṭhat sak an ni bawk.

Rualbanlote hian sawrkar aṭanga hamṭhatna dawng turin UDID Card (Rualbanlo ID) an neih zel a ngai tawh a. UDID Card siam tur hian an awmna District Hospital emaw Aizawl emaw an pan a ngai ṭhin a. UDID Card siam kawnga an harsatna sut kian anih theih nan leh anmahni puala hamṭhatna sawrkarin a duante an dawn ve ngei theih nan he UDID Assessment Camp hi kalpui a ni.

Assessment camp-hi Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Social Welfare Department leh Health & Family Welfare Department ṭangkawpin an buatsaih a ni a, Siaha district-ah chuan Social Welfare Department-a thawktute hmalaknain Health & Family Welfare Department, Mara Chanô Py (MCHP), BDO Tipa leh PHC Tipa ṭanghoin neih a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Sports Committee thukhawm
content:
264/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 23rd of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mamit District Sports Committee chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, Chairman Mamit District Sports Committee leh District Bawrhsap ni bawk hovin DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Mamit khawpui chhunga infiamna hmun kan neih Basketball Court, Futsal Ground leh Sadbhav Mandap Hall, Mangkhawngdai enkawl chungchang sawiho a ni a, a hmang turte tana dan zawm turte leh hman man chungchangte rel a ni.

Multipurpose Indoor Stadium, Mamit Field veng hawh leh hmang duhte tana hman man leh dan zawm turte duan fel a ni bawk.

Mamit District Hockey Association atanga Multipurpose Indoor Stadium hman dilna chu a hmunhma enin committee hian rem lutuk lo a ngaih a ni a, Hockey Association tan hian hmun remchang dang dapa cheithat sak dan zawn nise tih a ni.

Attachment
